title: stelis lacertina
intro: Stelis lacertina, also known as the lizard's tail orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Stelis. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis lacertina include its ability to treat skin conditions, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Stelis lacertina typically involve infusing the plant in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
